title: Discocalyx latepetiolata
intro: Discocalyx latepetiolata is a species of plant in the family Sapotaceae, commonly found in tropical regions and valued for its medicinal properties. The health benefits of Discocalyx latepetiolata include its potential to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, which can aid in treating various health conditions such as wounds, skin infections, and oxidative stress. Bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic compounds, which are responsible for its pharmacological activities. The most common herbal preparations made with Discocalyx latepetiolata include decoctions, infusions, and ointments, which are traditionally used to treat various health ailments in traditional medicine.
taxonomy: Discocalyx latepetiolata is classified within the family Sapotaceae, which is a family of flowering plants commonly known as the sapodilla family. This family consists of approximately 175 species of trees and shrubs. Discocalyx latepetiolata is further classified within the genus Discocalyx, which is a genus of flowering plants native to the tropical regions of Asia. The genus Discocalyx is characterized by its unique flowers and fruits, and is closely related to other genera within the Sapotaceae family. The classification of Discocalyx latepetiolata is based on its morphological characteristics, such as its leaf and flower structure.
